creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

You need to rebuild gobject-introspection, and all of its depenencies with 
debugging symbols.  You then need to rebuild libc and libthr with debugging 
symbols.  Once the hang occurs again, attach gdb to the running process, 
and get a backtrace. 

See http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html for more on getting 
useful backtraces.
